goal: create an offline artifact and produce a recoverable handoff
purpose: Validate context snapshot, handoff package, sessions context, and verification summary recovery data.
expected_capabilities: Creates a ContextSnapshot that carries recovery state.
Creates a HandoffPackage that carries recommended next command and verification summary.
acceptance: Snapshot and handoff include verification summary.
sessions --context shows snapshot, handoff, and verification status.
recommended_command: agent /run "create an offline artifact and produce a recoverable handoff" --root <workspace>
